title: Chinese Zodiac Calculator
seoDescription: Free Chinese Zodiac calculator. Find your zodiac animal by birth year. Discover the 12 Chinese zodiac signs: Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, Pig.
howToUseTitle: How to Use the Chinese Zodiac Calculator
step1Desc: Type your birth year (e.g., 1990). The Chinese zodiac follows the lunar calendar.
step2Desc: Click Find My Zodiac to discover your animal sign and its characteristics.
step3Desc: Read about your zodiac personality traits. Each animal has unique traits and compatibility.
faq1Q: How does the Chinese zodiac work?
faq1A: The Chinese zodiac cycles through 12 animals, each representing a year in a 12-year cycle.
faq2Q: Does it use lunar or solar calendar?
faq2A: Traditionally it follows the lunar calendar. This tool uses birth year for simplicity.
faq3A: Each animal sign has traditional compatibility with certain other signs.
